mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM activity WHERE type = #{type} AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM activity WHERE status = 1 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity (title, description, start_time, end_time, type, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{type}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT ap.id as ap_id, ap.activity_id, ap.product_id, ap.activity_price, ap.sort_order, ap.created_at as ap_created_at, p.id as p_id, p.name as p_name, p.category_id as p_category_id, p.brand_id as p_brand_id, p.price as p_price, p.original_price as p_original_price, p.stock as p_stock, p.sales as p_sales, p.rating as p_rating, p.description as p_description, p.specs as p_specs, p.image as p_image, p.images as p_images, p.status as p_status, p.created_at as p_created_at, p.updated_at as p_updated_at FROM activity_product ap LEFT JOIN product p ON ap.product_id = p.id WHERE ap.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY ap.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_product (activity_id, product_id, activity_price, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{productId}, #{activityPrice}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT ap.id as ap_id, ap.activity_id, ap.product_id, ap.activity_price, ap.sort_order, ap.created_at as ap_created_at, p.id as p_id, p.name as p_name, p.category_id as p_category_id, p.brand_id as p_brand_id, p.price as p_price, p.original_price as p_original_price, p.stock as p_stock, p.sales as p_sales, p.rating as p_rating, p.description as p_description, p.specs as p_specs, p.image as p_image, p.images as p_images, p.status as p_status, p.created_at as p_created_at, p.updated_at as p_updated_at FROM activity_product ap LEFT JOIN product p ON ap.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN activity a ON ap.activity_id = a.id WHERE a.type = #{type} AND a.status = 1 AND a.start_time <= NOW() AND a.end_time >= NOW() ORDER BY ap.sort_order ASC

SELECT ap.id as ap_id, ap.activity_id, ap.product_id, ap.activity_price, ap.sort_order, ap.created_at as ap_created_at, p.id as p_id, p.name as p_name, p.category_id as p_category_id, p.brand_id as p_brand_id, p.price as p_price, p.original_price as p_original_price, p.stock as p_stock, p.sales as p_sales, p.rating as p_rating, p.description as p_description, p.specs as p_specs, p.image as p_image, p.images as p_images, p.status as p_status, p.created_at as p_created_at, p.updated_at as p_updated_at FROM activity_product ap LEFT JOIN product p ON ap.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN activity a ON ap.activity_id = a.id WHERE ap.product_id = #{productId} AND a.status = 1 AND a.start_time <= NOW() AND a.end_time >= NOW() ORDER BY ap.sort_order ASC
